description_long: This is a stylized doll with a youthful appearance, featuring large green eyes, a small mouth, and a round face. The doll has light blue hair styled into two large buns on either side of the head, with white streaks and short bangs. It is dressed in a blue short-sleeved top with a black collar and tie, paired with white shorts that have black buttons and black knee-high socks. The doll stands on a simple, flat, hexagonal black base, and wears blue and white shoes. Visible accessories include blue wristbands and a black backpack with white straps. The overall design is playful and modern, with a color palette dominated by blue, white, and black.
description: A stylized doll with blue hair in buns, green eyes, and a blue-and-white outfit, standing on a black base with a backpack and wristbands.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, blue hair buns, green eyes, blue top, white shorts, black socks, and accessories including wristbands and a backpack.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the roundness of the hair buns, the backpack's thickness, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hair buns, the full backpack, the back of the shirt and shorts, and the base.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair buns, and the backpack's side.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a blue short-sleeved shirt with a black collar and tie, white shorts with black buttons, black knee-high socks, and blue-and-white shoes. The style is reminiscent of Japanese school uniforms with a playful, modern twist, and includes blue wristbands and a black backpack.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and slightly apart, head facing forward, and torso erect. The pose is static and symmetrical.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral facial expression with wide open green eyes, slightly arched eyebrows, and a small closed mouth, giving a calm and approachable appearance.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight light blue hair styled into two large round buns on either side of the head, with white streaks and short bangs.
